title: Document Registry Row
description: One row in the Document-Registry Google Sheet. Every document that exists in DOC HUB has exactly one active row here.

doc_id.description: UUID generated at creation time. Stable across renames and moves.

file_id.description: Google Drive file ID. Used to open, edit, and snapshot the document.

name.description: Current file name in Drive (without extension). Follows naming convention.

folder_path.description: Human-readable Drive path from DOC HUB root (e.g. 'Management/Legal').

folder_id.description: Drive folder ID of the current parent folder.

template_id.description: ID of the manifest template used to create this doc. '__adhoc-blank' or '__adopted' for non-template docs.

template_version.description: Version of the template at creation time (semver string).

status.description: Lifecycle status. Default queries filter out 'archived'. Agents should surface status to user.

created_by.description: Identifier of who created this doc. Format: 'human:<email>' or 'agent:<agent-id>'.

last_edited_by.description: Identifier of last editor (same format as created_by).

last_edited_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last edit via the engine.

owner.description: Email of the responsible owner for this document.

audience.description: Whether this document is for internal use or external distribution. Affects default share permissions.

locked_by.description: If set, the doc has a soft lock. Format: 'human:<email>' or 'agent:<id>'. Empty string = unlocked.

locked_until.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the lock automatically expires.

supersedes.description: doc_id of the document this one supersedes (if this is a major version replacement).

superseded_by.description: doc_id of the document that superseded this one. When set, this doc is effectively archived.

snapshots_json.description: JSON array string of snapshot records: [{url, hash, created_by, created_at}]. Appended on each doc-snapshot call.

imported_from.description: Original filename if this doc was created via doc-adopt from _Imports/.

brand_check_status.description: Result of the last brand-check run.

url.description: Direct Google Drive URL to open this document.
